title: Upgrade A Cluster — Update manifests
text:
Upgrading to a new Kubernetes version can provide new APIs.
You can use
kubectl convert
command to convert manifests between different API versions.
For example:
kubectl convert -f pod.yaml --output-version v1
The
kubectl
tool replaces the contents of
pod.yaml
with a manifest that sets
kind
to
Pod (unchanged), but with a revised
apiVersion
.
